description: Capture tmux pane scrollback for one selected session.

all_namespaces.description: Bypass namespace scoping and read across all namespaces.

json.description: Render the captured session and capture result as JSON.

namespace.description: Namespace slug to scope this read. Overrides the caller session namespace fallback.

scrollback_lines.description: Maximum tmux scrollback lines to include. When omitted, runtime-matters uses its default capture depth.

name: session_capture
